chunks.text: ORDER SHEET I N T HE HI G H CO U R T O F S I N DH B E N C H AT S U K K U R C. P No. D – 1539 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions 1. For orders on CMA No.7519/2025 (Ex.A) 2. For orders on CMA No.7518/2025 (1 Rule 10) 3. For orders on CMA No.6659/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of CMA No.6660/2025 (C/A) 09.12.2025 M/s Syed Jaffar Ali Shah and Ghulam Muhammad, Advocates for the Petitioners Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant AG Sindh along with Salahuddin Ghumro, Survey Superintendent, Sukkur at Khairpur >>>>>>>>>..<<<<<<<< Survey Superintendent, Sukkur Division at Khairpur is present and files a statement, which is taken on record and submits that the date for joint demarcation has been fixed by tomorrow i.e. 10.12.2025. However, counsel for the petitioners /applicants, under instructions, does not press the listed applications. Accordingly, the same are dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
